new_content.name: Eden's Promise (Savage)
new_content.description: High-difficulty raid tier receiving adjustments including the addition of the Echo, removal of weekly restrictions, and automatic coffer spawning.

new_content.name: The Tower at Paradigm's Breach
new_content.description: Added to the Duty Roulette: Alliance Raids rotation.

new_content.name: Bozjan southern front
new_content.description: Exploration zone receiving adjustments to rewards, critical engagement rewards, and exchange rates for forgotten fragments.

new_content.name: Delubrum Reginae
new_content.description: Duty receiving an increase in the number of timeworn artifacts rewarded upon completion.

new_content.name: The Weapon's Refrain (Ultimate)
new_content.description: Duty where an issue regarding player incapacitation at the edge of the battlefield was resolved.

new_content.name: A New Path of Resistance
new_content.description: Quest required to receive timeworn artifacts from Delubrum Reginae.

new_content.name: Duty Roulette: Alliance Raids
new_content.description: System feature updated to include The Tower at Paradigm's Breach.

new_content.name: Visit Another World Server
new_content.description: System feature allowing players to log in on another World to alleviate congestion.

new_content.name: Character Profile Quest Tracking
new_content.description: System feature allowing players to confirm quest completion status via the Lodestone.

new_content.name: Zadnor
new_content.description: Exploration zone where issues with NPC displays in skirmishes and duels were resolved.
